_meta.description: AIVoice 转写/总结诊断知识库，覆盖 extAttribute 状态追踪、MQTT 回传、结果获取

name: AIVoice 转写与总结问题
check_order: 1. 检查 AIBuds_DB 的 transcribeStatus（本地DB：0=未知, 1=转写中, 2=转写成功, 3=转写失败）
2. 检查 AIBuds_DB 的 summaryStatus（本地DB：0=老数据, 1=未知, 2=总结中, 3=总结成功, 4=总结失败）
2b. 检查 AIBuds_DB 的 translateStatus（本地DB：0=老数据, 1=未知, 2=翻译中, 3=翻译成功, 4=翻译失败）
3. 云端 MQTT 状态码统一为：0=未知, 1=初始, 2=进行中, 9=成功, 100=失败
4. 检查 AIBuds_FileUpdate 是否触发转写/总结
5. 检查 audioUploadStatus 是否为 2（上传完成才能触发云端转写）
6. 检查 recordSource（0 本地 / 1 云端）确认数据来源
7. ASR/NLG 记录由云端流式通道产生并存储，客户端无需上报 ASR 文本至云端 transcript 存储

common_causes.cause: 转录失败，检查音频文件是否上传成功、服务端转录服务状态
总结失败，检查转录是否完成、AI 总结服务状态
转录状态卡在「转录中」，可能服务端任务超时或消息推送丢失
音频未上传或上传失败，无法触发云端转写
转写任务启动失败，检查网络或参数
总结请求失败，检查转写是否完成或网络问题

normal_behaviors.description: DB 文件记录更新成功，属于正常状态变更

normal_behaviors.pattern: transcription record is too short and is treated as a successful summary
normal_behaviors.description: 云端返回 TranscribeTooShort 错误码时，客户端约定视为总结成功，回调给小程序展示对应错误码
normal_behaviors.how_to_identify: AIBuds_Upload 日志中出现此行，后续 summaryStatus 更新为成功

normal_behaviors.description: 实时 ASR 和 NLG 的识别记录由云端流式通道产生并存储，客户端无需将 ASR 全量文本上报至云端 transcript 存储。转写/总结服务直接读取云端已有的流式识别结果
normal_behaviors.how_to_identify: 系统架构约定，非日志可判断

phases.name: 触发转写
phases.success_pattern: Transcription task started successfully|Start transcription task
phases.failure_pattern: Transcription task failed to start|Invalid transcription parameter

phases.name: 总结完成
phases.success_pattern: Summary request succeeded|summaryStatus=2|scene: summary_mqtt.*succeeded|transcription record is too short and is treated as a successful summary

phase_mapping.success_pattern: Transcription task started successfully|Start transcription task
phase_mapping.failure_pattern: Transcription task failed to start|Invalid transcription parameter

phase_mapping.success_pattern: scene: trans_mqtt - Transcription successful|scene: trans_mqtt - Transcription status
phase_mapping.failure_pattern: scene: trans_mqtt - Transcription failed|scene: trans_mqtt.*Database synchronization failed

phase_mapping.success_pattern: Cloud transcription result obtained successfully|Cloud transcription data updated successfully
phase_mapping.failure_pattern: Failed to retrieve cloud transcription result|Cloud transcription data update failed

phase_mapping.success_pattern: Start summarizing the task|Summary request succeeded
phase_mapping.failure_pattern: Summary request failed|Summary failed: file does not exist

phase_mapping.success_pattern: Cloud summary result retrieved successfully|Update summary status to success|transcription record is too short and is treated as a successful summary
phase_mapping.failure_pattern: Summary result is empty|Failed to retrieve cloud summary results|Update summary status failed
